# The Automation Agency

> AI automation consultancy based in Derbyshire, UK. We build AI agents and automation systems that eliminate manual work for businesses.

## About

The Automation Agency is a UK-based technical consultancy specialising in AI agent development, process automation, and data pipeline engineering. Founded by a developer with 10+ years of experience building production automation systems across multiple industries.

We are based in Derbyshire and work with businesses across the United Kingdom.

Contact: hello@automation-agency.co.uk
Website: https://automation-agency.co.uk

## Services

- **AI Agent Development**: Custom autonomous AI agents integrated into existing business workflows
- **Process Automation**: End-to-end elimination of manual, repetitive business processes
- **Data Pipeline Engineering**: Automated data collection, transformation, and delivery from any source
- **Custom Integrations**: Connecting CRMs, ERPs, communication platforms, and payment systems
- **Communication Automation**: Automated email sequences, notifications, and multi-channel messaging
- **Free AI Audit**: 30-minute scoping session to identify automation opportunities at no cost

## Pricing

- Starter (single workflow): from £3,000 fixed price
- Full automation build (multiple workflows + agents): from £8,000 fixed price
- Monthly retainer (ongoing automation partner): from £1,500/month

## Case Studies

### WhatsApp Job Dispatch Platform
Automated field worker coordination for a service business. Eliminated manual dispatching, implemented race-safe payment claiming, built multi-tenant architecture. Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Twilio, Telegram Bot API, PostgreSQL.

### End-to-End Predictive Data Pipeline
Automated 6 daily data sources, 7 ML prediction models, 21 reconciliation jobs, and multi-channel subscriber distribution. Stack: Python, scikit-learn, Supabase, Selenium, APScheduler.

### UK Planning Application Monitor
Scraped and normalised planning application data across 97% of London boroughs with live dashboard. Replaced a full day of daily manual monitoring. Stack: Python, Playwright, Next.js, Supabase.

## Technical Capabilities

Python, Next.js, React, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Playwright, Selenium, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Twilio, Telegram Bot API, scikit-learn, Vercel, Docker, n8n, APScheduler, Resend

## Location

Derbyshire, United Kingdom. Serving clients nationally across the UK.
